# Stage 3 task 2 ADVANCE pass (FUN_005a4560 + FUN_005ed8e0, vtable+0xc) PCode-emu ground truth.
# PURE replay record/playback; acts only when ring(DAT_006d31bc)==0. PLAYBACK restores the 9-dword
# motion (+0x4../+0x34) from buf@+0x38[frame*0x24] + the 0x51-dword decide state (+0x40..+0x180)
# from buf@+0x3b0[frame*0x144]. NO-OP otherwise. No stubs/LUT. Each row: FIX <name> + verbatim CALL.
